parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json; const color = d.hasAlerts ? '#d32f2f' : '#2e7d32'; const isWeekly = d.periodDays >= 7; function bar(val, max) { const pct = max > 0 ? Math.round(100 * val / max) : 0; return '
'; } function arrow(pct) { if (pct > 5) return '▲ +' + pct + '%'; if (pct < -5) return '▼ ' + pct + '%'; return '→ ' + pct + '%'; } const alertsHtml = d.alerts.length ? '
⚠ ALERTY:
    ' + d.alerts.map(a => '
  • ' + a + '
    • ').join('') + '
' : '
✓ Brak alertow - wszystko dziala poprawnie
'; const errorsHtml = (title, list) => list.length ? '

Bledy - ' + title + '

    ' + list.map(e => '
  • ' + e.time + ' - ' + e.msg + '
    • ').join('') + '
' : ''; // ===== SEKCJA WARTOSC DODANA CAPI ===== const valueHtml = isWeekly ? `

Wartosc dodana CAPI w tym tygodniu

Co CAPI zrobilo dla Ciebie - eventy ktore Meta by nie dopasowala bez naszego rozwiazania

${d.value.recoveredPageView}
PageView z reklam Meta
odzyskanych przez CAPI
${d.value.recoveredLead}
Leady z reklam Meta
z pelnym dopasowaniem (fbc)
${d.value.leadWithFullMatch}
Leady z email+telefon
SHA256 (max dopasowanie)
${d.value.totalCapiEvents}
Wszystkie eventy
wyslane przez CAPI
Interpretacja: Kazdy event z parametrem fbc to uzytkownik ktory przyszedl z reklamy Meta. Bez CAPI, po wygasnieciu 3rd-party cookies, Meta nie przypisalaby tej konwersji do kampanii. Wg deklaracji Mety, sredni wzrost raportowanych dodatkowych konwersji dla PageView z fbc: +100% median.
` : ''; const html = `

Maltaview CAPI - ${isWeekly ? 'Raport Tygodniowy' : 'Alert Health Check'}

Wygenerowany: ${d.generatedAt} | Okres: ostatnie ${d.periodDays} dni

${alertsHtml} ${valueHtml}

PageView CAPI ${d.pageview.active ? '' : '(NIEAKTYWNY!)'}

Wykonania${d.pageview.current.total} (poprz: ${d.pageview.prev.total}) ${arrow(d.pageview.deltaPct)}
Sukces${d.pageview.current.success} / ${d.pageview.current.total} (${d.pageview.current.successRate}%)
Bledy${d.pageview.current.errors}
Eventy z fbc (ruch z reklam)${bar(d.pageview.current.withFbc, d.pageview.current.total)} ${d.pageview.current.withFbc} (${d.pageview.current.fbcRate}%) poprz: ${d.pageview.prev.fbcRate}%
Eventy z fbp${bar(d.pageview.current.withFbp, d.pageview.current.total)} ${d.pageview.current.withFbp} (${d.pageview.current.fbpRate}%)
Jakosc danych (Quality Score)${d.pageview.current.qualityPv}/100
Meta events_received${d.pageview.current.metaReceived}
${errorsHtml('PageView', d.pageview.current.errorList)}

Lead CAPI ${d.lead.active ? '' : '(NIEAKTYWNY!)'}

Wykonania${d.lead.current.total} (poprz: ${d.lead.prev.total}) ${arrow(d.lead.deltaPct)}
Sukces${d.lead.current.success} / ${d.lead.current.total} (${d.lead.current.successRate}%)
Bledy${d.lead.current.errors}
Lead z fbc (z reklam)${bar(d.lead.current.withFbc, d.lead.current.total)} ${d.lead.current.withFbc} (${d.lead.current.fbcRate}%) poprz: ${d.lead.prev.fbcRate}%
Lead z email (SHA256)${bar(d.lead.current.withEmail, d.lead.current.total)} ${d.lead.current.withEmail} (${d.lead.current.emailRate}%)
Lead z telefonem (SHA256)${bar(d.lead.current.withPhone, d.lead.current.total)} ${d.lead.current.withPhone} (${d.lead.current.phoneRate}%)
Jakosc danych (Quality Score)${d.lead.current.qualityLead}/100
Meta events_received${d.lead.current.metaReceived}
${errorsHtml('Lead', d.lead.current.errorList)}

Linki

  • Meta Events Manager - Pixel Maltaview
  • n8n - PageView CAPI
  • n8n - Lead CAPI

Automatyczny raport z n8n. Weekly: piatek 08:00. Health check: co 6h.
Twisted Pixel | CAPI Monitoring v2

`; return [{ json: { html, subject: (d.hasAlerts ? '[ALERT] ' : '') + 'Maltaview CAPI - ' + (isWeekly ? 'Raport Tygodniowy' : 'Health Check'), hasAlerts: d.hasAlerts, periodDays: d.periodDays } }];

Eventy z fbp${bar(d.pageview.current.withFbp, d.pageview.current.total)} ${d.pageview.current.withFbp} (${d.pageview.current.fbpRate}%)
Jakosc danych (Quality Score)${d.pageview.current.qualityPv}/100
Meta events_received${d.pageview.current.metaReceived}
${errorsHtml('PageView', d.pageview.current.errorList)}

Lead CAPI ${d.lead.active ? '' : '(NIEAKTYWNY!)'}

Wykonania${d.lead.current.total} (poprz: ${d.lead.prev.total}) ${arrow(d.lead.deltaPct)}
Sukces${d.lead.current.success} / ${d.lead.current.total} (${d.lead.current.successRate}%)
Bledy${d.lead.current.errors}
Lead z fbc (z reklam)${bar(d.lead.current.withFbc, d.lead.current.total)} ${d.lead.current.withFbc} (${d.lead.current.fbcRate}%) poprz: ${d.lead.prev.fbcRate}%
Lead z email (SHA256)${bar(d.lead.current.withEmail, d.lead.current.total)} ${d.lead.current.withEmail} (${d.lead.current.emailRate}%)
Lead z telefonem (SHA256)${bar(d.lead.current.withPhone, d.lead.current.total)} ${d.lead.current.withPhone} (${d.lead.current.phoneRate}%)

${errorsHtml('Lead', d.lead.current.errorList)}
